mapper.select: select sys_id , link_sys_id , option_cd , option_nm , option_data , description from sys_rule_detail srd where 1=1 and link_sys_id = #{sysId}
mapper.insert:
insert into sys_rule_detail ( sys_id , link_sys_id , option_cd , option_nm , option_data , description, insert_user_id, insert_datetime ) values
( #{item.sysId}, #{item.linkSysId}, #{item.optionCd}, #{item.optionNm}, #{item.optionData}, #{item.description}, #{userId}, now() )

update.foreach: update sys_rule_detail set option_nm = #{item.optionNm}, option_data = #{item.optionData}, description = #{item.description}, modify_user_id = #{userId}, modify_datetime = now() where 1=1 and sys_id = #{item.sysId}

mapper.delete:
update sys_rule_detail set delete_yn = 'Y', modify_user_id = #{userId}, modify_datetime = now() where 1=1 and sys_id in
#{item.sysId}
